questionHtml: Explain how the structure of vitamin A is important to vision using section 35 of the data booklet.
markschemeHtml:
vitamin A oxidized to «11-cis-»retinal

 

extended conjugation

OR

extensive delocalization

 

cis-retinal converts to trans-retinal through absorption of light

 

Accept “vitamin A/hydroxyl/hydroxy/alcohol/CH2OH group oxidized to aldehyde/CHO «group in retinal»”.

[3 marks]

meta.title: Explain how the structure of vitamin A is important to vision using section 35 of the data booklet.
